home.title: Welcome to geolivier
home.description1: Geomatician in its most literal sense: geographer turned developer. Coming from research and cartography, I now develop web applications or data processing pipelines.
home.hiring_status: I am currently open to new freelance or full-time opportunities.
home.description2: If you want to know more about my profile, you can consult examples of <1>projects</1> I have worked on, the <2>blog</2> where I try to post articles about the unique world of geomatics, or my <3>detailed profile</3>.

about.title: My journey
about.description1: From geographer to developer, this is a simple summary of my journey. During my first research master's in geography, while considering a PhD, I became passionate about the world of GIS and [remote sensing](/projects/ossoue).
about.description2: However, I felt that this was only the tip of the geomatics iceberg. I decided to pursue a more technical master's and discovered web mapping during an internship.
about.description3: 13 years later, I'm still as passionate as ever about cartography, and I now have the skills to put my maps at the heart of complex, maintainable, and high-performing applications.
about.description4: My background has enabled me to master the entire development lifecycle of complex web applications, from designing scalable architectures to deploying them in modern DevOps environments.
about.description5: It's this dual perspective that guides my work: I focus on code quality without ever losing sight of the spatial and business dimension of my [projects](/projects).
about.experience.0.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer & Lead Tech Geo
about.experience.0.tagline: International Environment | Humanitarian | Cloud & Open Source
about.experience.0.highlights: Key Accounts & Critical Systems: Led the design and deployment of complete Information Systems for international organizations (MSF, UNHCR), notably on the [GeoMSF](/projects/mapcentre) project.
Agile & DevOps: Technical lead within multi-team projects. Implementation of Agile methodologies and solid CI/CD pipelines to guarantee the quality and scalability of deliverables.
Emergency Response: Rapid deployment of technological solutions during major crises (COVID, Ukraine, Palestine), combining responsiveness, performance, and scalability.
Hybrid Ecosystems: Cross-functional expertise between Open Source solutions (optimized budgets) and complex integrations into the ESRI ecosystem for major NGOs.
Optimization & Infrastructure: Management of Cloud/VPS environments and optimization for low-bandwidth areas (PWA, Electron, performance of builds).
Mentorship: Technical supervision of junior developers and interns in a 100% remote and multicultural work context (fluent English).
about.experience.1.title: GIS Fullstack Developer
about.experience.1.highlights: Institutional Projects: Development of business tools for public and government actors (Ordre des Géomètres Experts, national agencies).
Data Engineering: Design and management of complex spatial databases (PostgreSQL/PostGIS) and creation of high-precision data processing pipelines.
API & Web Development: Implementation of robust API architectures for the exploitation and dissemination of geographical data.
Autonomy & Versatility: Evolved within a human-sized agile team, intervening on the entire technical stack, from backend to map visualization.
about.experience.2.title: GIS Intern
about.experience.2.description: Created responsive and interactive user interfaces, collaborated with designers, and optimized application performance.
about.experience.3.title: Master’s in Geographic Computer Science
about.experience.3.description: Programming, modeling, GIS and remote sensing
about.experience.4.title: Master's in Environmental Mapping and Natural Hazards
